title: Wbanana
description: add a banana to your minecraft world
body:
🍌 Wbanana - the most useless mod....
Did you think Minecraft had seen everything? Think again.
Here is W Banana, a mod that adds ...
➡️ A banana

🟡 What you get:
🥲 A banana

Does nothing useful.


🤔 Why install this mod?
Because you love bananas.

Because you have no valid reason, and that's what's beautiful.

📦 Compatibility:
✅ Minecraft 1.21.8
✅ Manufacture / Forge
✅ Compatible with all mods (no conflict, because he does ...
Nothing 😭)
 🤔How to use it:
make trade with the farmer villager

📥 Download W Banana
And gives meaning to your life.
Or maybe not. But at least you will have a banana.
